purpose: Define the clinic operator acceptance and go/no-go checklist that must be completed outside repository evidence before real operational use.

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator verifies production users, RBAC roles, and least-privilege access for doctors, operators, system admins, and patient portal users.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: self-hosted RBAC and portal contracts exist in repository

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator verifies patient lookup, visit workspace, lesion/report workflow, follow-up queue, and patient portal flows with clinic-approved test data.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: clinical workspace and follow-up tests exist in repository

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator verifies local SOP policy templates, application, exceptions, audit rollup, governance, archive readiness, and handoff receipt workflow match clinic process.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: Stage 22A-47Z local SOP policy governance chain exists in repository

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator verifies privacy posture, local data handling, backups, audit retention, and no secrets or PHI are stored in git.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: guards protect repository artifacts from secret-like and storage-object markers

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator verifies deployment readiness, health/readiness checks, backup restore, incident path, and Device Bridge operational boundaries where applicable.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: self-hosted ops, release archive, and Device Bridge readiness artifacts exist in repository

goCriteria.criterion: Clinic operator obtains external legal/compliance and clinical-owner approval before real use.
goCriteria.repositoryEvidence: repository explicitly does not prove external legal approval, clinical approval, or medical correctness

noGoCriteria: Any required role, portal, clinical workspace, SOP governance, privacy, backup, or recovery check is unverified.
Clinic operator cannot identify accountable owners for legal/compliance and clinical approval.
Production users or patient data are used before external clinic approval.
A repository artifact is treated as proof of medical correctness or legal sufficiency.
A future numbered batch is started without a new explicit plan decision.
expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: Operator Acceptance / Clinic Go-No-Go checklist synced from main, no conflicts.
